name: Grandmother's Potato Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Blend in the potatoes and vanilla extract.
4. Combine the flour, cocoa, and baking soda; add alternately with the milk, blending well after each addition.
5. Stir in the nuts.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13-in. x 9-in. x 2-in. baking pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
